title: dryopteris glandulosum
intro: Dryopteris glandulosum, also known as the glandular lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris glandulosum include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
